backend/main.mo: Motoko actor implementing an ICDex ICP/ckUSDT grid trading bot with configurable interval, spread, and order count, using recurring timers to place buy/sell grid orders around the mid-price fetched from the ICDex canister.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report JSON file with no features listed.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, serving as a reference for the project's frontend structure.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, including colors for background, foreground, card, border, chart, and sidebar tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell that mounts the React app into a root div and loads the Vite/TypeScript entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component composing the sticky Header, responsive dashboard grid of BotControlPanel, ConfigurationPanel, MarketDataPanel, and GridPreviewTable, plus a branded Footer.
React panel component displaying bot running/stopped status with animated indicator and Start/Stop buttons that call the corresponding backend mutations with loading and error states.
frontend/src/components/ConfigurationPan: React form panel for editing intervalSeconds, spreadBps, and numOrders bot configuration fields, with client-side validation and a Save button that calls the setConfig mutation.
frontend/src/components/GridPreviewTable: Displays a sorted table of the bot's current grid orders (buys and sells) with badges showing order counts, loading skeletons, and a refresh button.
Shows the latest mid price for the ICP/ckUSDT pair along with exchange info, with loading state and a manual refresh button.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context with login/logout functionality, session persistence via AuthClient, and a React provider/hook pair.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for polling bot status, config, mid price, and grid data, plus mutations for starting/stopping the bot and updating config.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up a terminal-dark theme using OKLCH CSS variables for both light and dark modes, imports JetBrains Mono font, and defines utility classes for buy/sell colors and terminal styling.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the trading terminal frontend, defining a dark terminal-inspired theme with oklch color variables, custom fonts (JetBrains Mono, Inter), trading-specific colors (buy/sell/running/stopped), and animation plugins.
project_state.json: Project state tracker for an ICP/ckUSDT trading bot on ICDex, documenting version 13 state including architectural notes, known issues (budget_exceeded on smart grid repositioning), and a history of implemented features across the Motoko backend and React frontend.
